message:
feat(posix): Implement full POSIX module with runtime functions

Replace stub with proper implementation including:
- File/directory ops: getcwd, chdir, mkdir, rmdir, unlink, rename, symlink, readlink, link
- Stat operations: stat, lstat, fstat, access
- FD operations: open, close, read, write, dup, dup2, pipe
- Process ops: getpid, getppid, getuid, getgid, fork, kill, wait, waitpid
- Environment: getenv
- Permissions: chmod, chown, umask
- System info: uname, urandom
- Constants: O_RDONLY, O_WRONLY, F_OK, R_OK, SEEK_SET, etc.
